subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Whose verses have encompassed the world, and Whose manifestations of grandeur have testified to His oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را که آیاتش عالم را احاطه نموده و ظهورات عظمتش بر یکتائیش گواهی داده
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @relationship between government and people
